metadata.description: MCP server for Tock (exploretock.com) — list cities, search a metro, get venue details and their bookable experiences, prices, and open dates/times. Uses a companion Chrome extension so every request comes from your real signed-in browser (no cookie paste, no bot-wall dance).

plugins.name: tock-mcp
plugins.description: Tock (exploretock.com) restaurant discovery for Claude — relays through a companion Chrome extension in your signed-in exploretock.com tab.
